summary: Plan-mode inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations are planned. Hydrated PRs are kept as independent backlog items because this shard is not a dedupe cluster, merge/fix are blocked by job frontmatter, and the artifact does not provide merge preflight. One already-closed PR is skipped. Five job-listed refs were not present in the hydrated preflight item matrix, so those specific decisions need fresh hydration.
